name: TransAfrica Fulfillment Park - South Africa
shortDescription: A central African distribution point designed for multi-modal freight, high-volume picking, and regional retail replenishment.
description:
TransAfrica Fulfillment Park supports road, rail, and air transport through OR Tambo International Airport. The warehouse layout is optimized for high-volume picking, carton flow, and palletized goods. With strong security infrastructure and compliance with regional trade standards, it is ideal for pan-African distribution strategies and long-haul retail replenishment.

Working Hours (SAST):
Mon-Fri: 07:00-19:00
Sat: 08:00-15:00
Sun: Closed
